utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Although , do not feel like you can not visit .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , is , is , is Chandler here ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You guys , Joey just saw Janice kissing her ex ... husband .

emotion_cause.span: 5_Joey just saw Janice kissing her ex ... husband .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What ? So what are you going to do ? I mean how , how are you going to tell Chandler ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_Joey just saw Janice kissing her ex ... husband .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I was thinking about that and I , I think the best way would be , to not .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Joey , you can not keep this to yourself , if you know about this , you have to tell him .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It will kill him . I mean it will , it will just kill him .

emotion_cause.span: 9_It will kill him . I mean it will , it will just kill him .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , you could wait til I go to the dentist , maybe
